privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for qground_control_env maritime_shipboard_follow_config task. Verified that the task uses completely synthetic deployment data generated via bash scripts. All metadata claims exactly match the values required by the task description (maritime_brief.txt) and enforced by the verification scripts (export_result.sh, verifier.py), including the target rally point coordinates (-35.3655, 149.1610), altitude (15), and file paths.
